summary: Soundboard capture with clear moments but plagued by interference and dropouts; the show shines on a scorching Samson & Delilah and an insane Let It Grow jam.
review: The SBD source is generally clear and balanced, yet suffers from noticeable buzz, intermittent interference, and occasional drop‑outs that detract from the listening experience. Musically the performance is memorable – a powerhouse rendition of “Samson & Delilah” and an out‑of‑this‑world jam during “Let It Grow” (including an all‑band space section) make up for the missing first set.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical moments boost the rating, but missing first‑set material and technical glitches lower overall enjoyment; three reviews give a balanced view.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear and balanced when intact, but suffers from buzz/interference on “Let It Grow” and occasional drop‑outs/cuts throughout the tape.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is missing, leaving only a strong second set highlighted by an all‑band space jam and a killer “Samson & Delilah” performance.

band_member_comments.Drums: All‑band space jam during the second set is highlighted as a major positive.
